nodes.label: NOTE: This file should not be edited
nodes.norm_label: note: this file should not be edited

nodes.label: Canonical Data Schema Ownership
nodes.source_location: ControlP owns its canonical data schema (lib/schema.ts)

nodes.label: Role Adapter Pattern
nodes.source_location: Registry tools are replaceable adapters behind role interfaces (lib/adapters/)

nodes.label: Local-First Web-Ready Boundary
nodes.source_location: Local-first with a web-ready boundary: all data access is server-side through adapters

nodes.label: CameraDirector
nodes.summary: Controls camera lerp to home base position and locks rotation/zoom when a reading formation (health diagnostic, grid) is active.

nodes.label: Health Diagnostic Formation
nodes.summary: Fish-eye 3D formation for Project Health: the focused project dominates at center, others shrink and recede in Z; orb left + aligned data panel (name, tag, graph metric, health bar, percentage) in a scrollable vertical list.

nodes.label: Fish-Eye Lens Effect
nodes.summary: Visual metaphor where the central/selected item dominates size and z-position; surrounding items progressively shrink and recede.

nodes.label: Auto-Sized Grid Formation
nodes.summary: Vault Projects formation: projects arranged in an auto-sized grid in a distant plane with no overlaps.

nodes.label: CSS Morph Transition
nodes.summary: Smooth continuous CSS morph between label/formation modes from a single anchor point; enables fluid visual transitions between orbit, health diagnostic, and grid formations.

nodes.label: Vitals with Progress Bars
nodes.summary: VitalsPanel updated to display project health metrics as progress bars with percentage readouts.

nodes.label: Command Deck Views
nodes.summary: Schedule and System Feed consolidated as named views within the Command Deck panel, reducing top-level panel count.

nodes.label: Interactive 3D Formations
nodes.summary: V1.3.1 main feature: multiple named 3D spatial arrangements (orbit, health diagnostic, grid) that the user can switch between; each locks the camera via CameraDirector and presents a reading-optimized layout.

links.source_location: Swapping a tool = writing one adapter
canonical schema is pure JSON (future API wire format)
